name: Saab AB
description: Saab AB is a leading global defense and security company headquartered in Sweden. The company serves the global market with world-leading products, services, and solutions within military defense and civil security. Saab's operations are divided into several business areas, including Aeronautics, Dynamics, Surveillance, and Kockums. Its portfolio features the Gripen fighter system, advanced missile systems, radar and electronic warfare solutions, and state-of-the-art submarines. Saab focuses on innovation and technology to provide efficient solutions for national security and public safety across air, land, sea, and cyber domains.
